backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (content items, haunted houses, audition forms, etc.) and backend logic for a scream park application with authorization mixins. Contains type definitions for events, scare zones, shows, attractions, haunted houses, and multiple audition form types.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping planned feature IDs to their target files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering new show entries (Waterworks Stunt Show, Dog Show, Halfway to Horror Nights) and related image registrations.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase's components, pages, and content modules.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'TCEA Scream Park' and mounting the app at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component implementing hash-based client-side routing across all pages and sections of the scream park site, wrapping the app with QueryClientProvider, audio management, and layout components.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Headless component that manages looping background audio (chainsaw and ambient eerie tracks), handling autoplay blocking, volume preferences, enable/disable toggling, and exposing a manual start callback to the parent.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: A UI component that renders a mute/unmute toggle button and a volume slider, using sound preferences from a custom hook and handling autoplay-blocked scenarios.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: A simple display-only card component that shows an 'Access Denied' message for non-admin users attempting to access the CMS.
frontend/src/components/auth/EmployeeGua: A route guard component that restricts access to employee-only areas, handling unauthenticated, loading, and unauthorized states with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout and managing loading states.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and create a profile, saving it via the actor and invalidating the profile query on success.
frontend/src/components/layout/Construct: A decorative section component displaying three construction milestone cards (start, complete, grand opening) with horror-themed animations and styling.
frontend/src/components/layout/EmployeeL: A layout wrapper for the employee portal that renders a dark-themed header with breadcrumb navigation, a main content area, and a confidential footer.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: A reusable page section wrapper that renders a centered title, optional subtitle, separator, and slotted children within a container.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: The site footer component that includes the ConstructionTimeline, an extreme haunt warning alert, and a copyright attribution link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware styling, mobile menu toggle, and dynamic nav items based on authentication status and employee role, including sound controls and login button.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Full-screen video overlay modal with play/pause and mute toggle controls, autoplay support, and Escape key dismissal.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutAt: Page section displaying the TCEA Scream Park's physical description and fictional dark backstory with a hero image and styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Renders a three-card grid highlighting audition perks (food, training, scary vibes) with icons and descriptions.
Provides two side-by-side signup cards for scare actor and dancer auditions, each with a description, badge, and callback-driven apply button.

A modal dialog form for submitting costume character audition applications, requiring Internet Identity login and collecting personal info, skills, and preferences before submitting via a mutation hook.

A dialog component for dancer audition applications that requires Internet Identity authentication and collects name, age, experience, what they love to do, and role preference before submitting via a mutation hook.
A dialog component for haunted house supervisor audition sign-ups (coming 2026/27 season) that requires authentication and collects contact info, experience, availability, and leadership experience.
A dialog component for scare actor audition applications that mirrors the dancer dialog structure, requiring login and collecting name, age, experience, interests, and role preference.
A dialog component for usher audition sign-ups (March 2–3, 2027) that enforces a minimum age of 16 and collects contact details, availability, and experience after authentication.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Auditions section listing multiple role types (scare actor, dancer, costume character, usher, supervisor) with cards and dialog-based signup forms for each role.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Static page section showcasing a scenic elevation image and descriptive text for the Clown Town haunted house interior.
frontend/src/components/sections/Costume: Announcement section for a 2030 park investment introducing new costume characters (Lola, Asher, Max, DD, and princesses) with character cards and an audition CTA.
frontend/src/components/sections/Employe: Conditionally rendered card that appears only for authenticated employees, providing a navigation button to the employee secret tunnels portal.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Renders a grid of food booth cards with images, descriptions, menu highlights, and badges, supporting navigation to detail pages for select booths via hash routing.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Displays a grid of haunted house cards with images, descriptions, and buttons to navigate to detail pages or rules pages for specific houses via hash routing.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Full-screen hero section with a background video, animated overlays, the park logo, tagline, and buttons to scroll to auditions or navigate to scare actor/dancer audition pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Video player section with autoplay, mute toggle, fullscreen support, and a clown laugh audio effect that triggers when the video ends.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Static section displaying information and an image about the Main Street Plaza Procession event that occurs nightly at 6pm.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Displays park info including operating hours, ticket pricing with a pass selector, and rules/warnings such as the 11pm nightly release and scare actor conduct guidelines.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Displays a merch storefront section featuring Felix's Merch Booth with an image header, category filter buttons, and a filterable product grid using data from merchStorefront content.
frontend/src/components/sections/passes/: Defines the PassOption interface and exports a centralized array of nine pass options with id, name, price, and description for use across the passes section.
A UI component that renders a list of pass options as radio-button cards, allowing users to select one and confirm it, showing a temporary success alert upon confirmation.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Renders a grid of scare zone cards with images, descriptions, and buttons to navigate to zone detail or rules pages, with hover animations and visual effects.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Shows a 2x2 grid of sneak peek cards for four haunted houses, each with an image, tagline, truncated description, and a button to navigate to the full sneak peek route.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Renders a grid of live show cards with images, badges for timing/season info, and descriptions, sourced from the shows content file with hover spotlight animations.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: An interactive slideshow section supporting both image and video slides with previous/next navigation, thumbnail selection, fullscreen toggle, and autoplay handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: A teaser section announcing two new haunted houses coming in 2027, displaying their names, taglines, and atmospheric descriptions in styled cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Renders a styled teaser card with a pulsing sparkles icon and 'Many Things to Come' message to hint at future announcements.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Displays upcoming park attractions (2027–2029) grouped by year, each shown as a card with image, description, badges, and support for sub-attractions.
Shows upcoming special events as cards with image galleries, dates, and descriptions, including a detailed water slides breakdown for the Soak Kingdom event.
Lists planned future themed lands from content data, displaying each land's name, status, opening year, size, and featured shows as cards.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: React component that renders a layered horror-themed background with animated fire, smoke, chainsaw, and blood image overlays, plus gradient tints, vignette, and noise texture effects.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Static content data defining horror-themed food booth names, taglines, descriptions, and menu items for the event.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps content names (haunted houses, scare zones, food booths, merch shops, auditions, shows) to their corresponding generated image asset paths.
frontend/src/content/guestRules.ts: Static content defining per-attraction guest rules organized by safety, behavior, and health/safety warning sections for haunted house attractions.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Static content data listing haunted house attractions with their names, taglines, and descriptions for the horror event.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Static content defining merchandise shop names, items sold, and prices, plus a note about additional shops in the park.
frontend/src/content/merchStorefront.ts: Defines the merch storefront catalog with product interfaces, category list, and an array of products (hoodies, hats, shirts, posters, plushies) for four characters: Riley, Ace, Kevin, and Rocky. No checkout or payment logic is included.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports an array of scare zone objects, each with a name, tagline, description, and location, covering themed outdoor horror areas like Carnival Bros Circus, Zombie Hell, and Steampunk Hell.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Exports a single object containing the title, subtitle, description, and image path for a sneak peek of the Schoolhouse haunted house attraction.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Exports an array of show objects with name, description, haunt-season flag, and optional year, covering live entertainment offerings ranging from horror theatrical shows to kid-friendly performances.
frontend/src/content/showsEntrance.ts: Defines and exports content for a backstage Shows & Processions secret entrance, including unlock year, locked/unlocked descriptions, location details, and performer access instructions.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Exports slider items (images and a video) for a 'Sliders of Decade' haunt season showcase, along with the section title and subtitle.
frontend/src/content/tceaTunnels.ts: Defines and exports content for the TCEA employee tunnels, covering the secret entrance, dormitories, cafeteria, TV/recreation room, and staff lounge areas.
frontend/src/content/themedLands.ts: Defines the ThemedLand interface and exports an array of themed land entries, currently containing only the planned 'Kid Grove' family land opening in 2050.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Exports a static array of upcoming event objects for a theme park, each containing name, description, date label, and date components (year, month, day).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionLinks.ts: Custom hook that fetches audition links from the backend actor using React Query, returning an array of AuditionLink objects.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Provides React Query mutation hooks for submitting various audition forms (scare actor, dancer, costume character, usher, haunted house supervisor) to the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Provides React Query hooks for authorization checks including fetching the caller's user role, admin status, employee status, and user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: Custom hook that manages HTML video autoplay behavior, handling browser autoplay blocking and exposing play/pause controls along with playback state.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on content items (events, scare zones, shows, attractions), including fetching, creating, updating, deleting, and seeding initial content via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmployeeEvents.ts: Custom hook that fetches upcoming events for authenticated employees from the backend actor, passing the current date to filter results.
Custom hook that fetches the event unlock status for the authenticated user from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Custom hook that manages fullscreen state for a given element ref, providing cross-browser enter, exit, and toggle fullscreen methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
Exports two React Query hooks for fetching and updating the main haunt schedule via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutation success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: Manages user sound preferences (enabled state and volume) with localStorage persistence, providing getter and setter helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useTunnelData.ts: Exports three React Query hooks for fetching tunnel maps, room assignments, and tunnel schedules from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS for the app using Tailwind, including an OKLCH-based horror theme with orange/black/green variables, dark mode overrides, and utility classes for glow and spotlight effects.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Provides utility functions to format backend content types (dates, event types, scare levels, locations, age restrictions, performance types) into human-readable strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ActorsPage.tsx: A protected page displaying actor staffing information that requires Internet Identity authentication, showing a login prompt for unauthenticated users and staffing counts for authenticated ones.
frontend/src/pages/AuditionsPage.tsx: Displays a list of audition links fetched from the backend, with loading/error states and a hardcoded hiring banner for makeup artists.
frontend/src/pages/BlackjackPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Blackjack' haunted house attraction, displaying a hero image, extreme horror warning, description, and navigation buttons for going back or viewing rules.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Event calendar page that fetches all content items, groups them by date (expanding date ranges), supports type filtering via tabs, URL hash navigation to specific dates, and shows item details in a dialog.
Detail page for the 'Candy Cane Carnage' food booth, showing its hero image, description, and full menu list with optional item descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/ChainsawColdPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Chainsaw Cold' scare zone, displaying a hero image, extreme horror warning alert, zone description, and a button to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Sneak peek detail page for the 'Clown Town' haunted house, showing its hero image, name, tagline, and description in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Admin CMS page that requires Internet Identity authentication and admin authorization, providing CRUD operations for content items, main haunt schedule management, and initial content seeding via tabbed dialogs and a data table.
frontend/src/pages/DancerAuditionPage.ts: A form page for submitting dancer audition applications, requiring Internet Identity authentication, with fields for name, age, height, weight, experience, and role preference.
frontend/src/pages/EggnogExorcismPage.ts: A detail page for the 'Eggnog Exorcism' food booth, displaying its image, description, and menu items fetched from static content data.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeUpcomingEvent: An employee-only page that lists upcoming park events with lock/unlock status, images, and navigation links, fetched via a custom hook.
frontend/src/pages/FlynCharacterPage.tsx: An employee-only detail page for the 'Flyn' costume character, showing bio, appearance schedule, and costume details conditionally based on whether the event is unlocked.
frontend/src/pages/FrostedHauntPage.tsx: A detail page for the 'Frosted Haunt' seasonal event, displaying its image, description, date range, safety warning, and event highlights.
frontend/src/pages/GingerdeadBakesPage.t: A detail page for the 'Gingerdead Bakes' food booth, displaying its image, tagline, description, and menu items from static content data.
frontend/src/pages/GuestRulesPage.tsx: Displays guest rules for a specific haunted house or scare zone, determined by parsing the URL hash. Shows mandatory rules content from the guestRules data source with back navigation to the appropriate section.
frontend/src/pages/HappilyScaryAfterPage: Employee-only page for the 'Happily Scary After' fireworks show that conditionally renders locked or unlocked content based on the event's unlock status fetched from a hook.
Detail page for the 'Hellfire Hot Cocoa' food booth, displaying its image, description, and full menu items with optional descriptions sourced from the foodBooths content.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Detail page for the 'Terror Hell Hole' haunted house featuring its main image and description, plus a dedicated section for the 'Vicky's Saw' sub-attraction with its own image and lore.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Laser Hell' scare zone, showing its image, location, tagline, and description sourced from the scareZones content, with a fallback card if the zone is not found.
frontend/src/pages/ObsessionScreamPage.t: Detail page for the 'Obsession Scream' haunted house featuring an extreme horror warning alert, the attraction's image, narrative description of the experience, and a character introduction for Leslie.
frontend/src/pages/OpenIceTombPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Open Ice Tomb' haunted house, displaying its image, description, and an extreme horror warning, with navigation back to the haunted houses list and a link to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/OrnamentOssuaryPage.t: Detail page for the 'Ornament Ossuary' food booth, showing its image, description, and full menu with item names and descriptions, with a back button to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/PaintDeathBoothPage.t: Detail page for the 'Paint & Death' food booth that splits the menu into two themed columns—Paint Side and Death Side—alongside the booth's image and description.
frontend/src/pages/SantasHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the "Santa's Hell" scare zone, displaying its image, description, and an extreme horror warning, with navigation back to scare zones and a link to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/ScareActorAuditionPag: Audition submission form page for scare actor applicants, requiring Internet Identity authentication and collecting fields like name, age, experience, and role preference before submitting via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: A sneak peek detail page that displays a large hero image, title, subtitle, and description sourced from the schoolhouseSneakPeek content file, with a back button to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/SecretTunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying confidential backstage tunnel infrastructure, including tunnel maps, room assignments, and schedules fetched via custom hooks, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Sharks Hell' food booth, displaying its image, description, tagline, and menu items sourced from static content files.
frontend/src/pages/ShowsEntrancePage.tsx: Employee-only page showing the secret entrance for shows and processions, with locked/unlocked state driven by an event unlock status API and conditional display of access instructions.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Slider Doom' food booth, displaying its image, description, tagline, and menu items sourced from static content files.
frontend/src/pages/TCEATunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page presenting TCEA tunnel facilities (dorms, food, TV room, etc.) with a secret entrance alert and facility cards populated from static content.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlayPage.ts: Detail page for the 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house attraction, featuring a hero image, horror warning, scene descriptions, and character imagery sourced from static content.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: A sneak peek detail page for the 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house, displaying its image, name, tagline, and description with a back-to-home navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/WaxWorksPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Wax Works' haunted house featuring an extreme horror warning alert, house description, and a button to navigate to the guest rules page.
frontend/src/pages/WrathOfWrappingPage.t: Detail page for the 'Wrath of Wrapping' food booth, showing its image, description, and a full menu list with item names and descriptions.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Utility functions for working with EventDateRange objects, including converting dates to string keys, comparing dates, and expanding date ranges into arrays of individual date key strings.
frontend/src/utils/slug.ts: Exports a single `slugify` function that converts a string to a URL-friendly lowercase slug by removing special characters and replacing spaces with hyphens.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Creepster), CSS variable-based color tokens, custom box shadows, and horror-themed animations/keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the current version, summary, architectural notes, and existing features for a theme park app, including recently added shows (Waterworks Stunt Show, Dog Show, Halfway to Horror Nights) and their image requirements.
